summary: Benchmark definitions and reusable case sets are complete. Latest runtime-loop-proof still passes, recorded verdict evidence has started, and the main uncovered area is structured review coverage for human-facing quality.

benchmark_families.structural_gap: council-review-packet does not yet expose audience-facing and organization-diagnosis fields as structured properties

next_required_actions: Record a weak-artifact rejection verdict for RV-001.
Record a human-low-ai-high conflict verdict for RV-002.
Record prose-only and partial-chain fail verdicts for RD-001 and RD-002.
Add a human-audit-style runtime trace verdict for RD-004.
Implement TASK-031 so review-validity can be checked with structured runtime fields instead of rationale text alone.
